🎯 Competition Tips – April 12
Buzz before the last sentence🎯
Capital ≠ Largest City (always check)⚠️
Missouri = longest US river🌊
Nobel Peace Prize = Oslo only🕊️
Canberra = Australia's capital🇦🇺
Abu Dhabi = UAE capital (not Dubai)🇦🇪
Putrajaya = Malaysia admin capital🇲🇾
